titles.en: Reward of reciting Surah Naml, Shuara and Qasas

text: : مَنْ قَرَأَ سُورَهَ الطَّوَاسِینَ الثَّلَاثَهِ فِی لَیْلَهِ الْجُمُعَهِ کَانَ مِنْ أَوْلِیَاءِ اللَّهِ وَ فِی جِوَارِ اللَّهِ وَ کَنَفِهِ وَ لَمْ یُصِبْهُ فِی الدُّنْیَا بُؤْسٌ أَبَداً وَ أُعْطِیَ فِی الْآخِرَهِ مِنَ الْجَنَّهِ حَتَّی یَرْضَی وَ فَوْقَ رِضَاهُ وَ زَوَّجَهُ اللَّهُ مِائَهَ زَوْجَهٍ مِنْ حُورِ الْعِینِ.

en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from al-Hussain b. Abi al-’Ala from Abi Basir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who recites Surah Tawaseen (Surah Naml, Shuara and Qasas) every Friday eve would be included among the lovers of Allah. He would remain in the protection of Allah. He would never fall prey to helplessness and would get Paradise much more than he desired. The Almighty Allah would marry him to more than one hundred Hoorul Ein.”
